column2: Verify OSC Acceptance and Safety Risk Assessment
column3: ['Check if applicants provide clear evidence of mitigated safety risks. ', 'Confirm CAA accepts an OSC after reviewing the provided evidence. ', 'Verify that CAA confirms safety risks are both tolerable and ALARP. ']
column4: ['The provided documentation contains sufficient information to demonstrate that all relevant hazards have been identified and suitably mitigated. ', 'CAA has reviewed the submitted evidence, found it acceptable, and decided to accept the OSC. ', 'The CAA has confirmed in writing that the identified safety risks have been assessed as both tolerable and As Low As Reasonably Practicable (ALARP). ']
